text: A home-rule municipality may regulate the movement of a structure over or on a street of the municipality.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 311. Gen. Provisions Relating to Mun. Streets
##### § 311.005 — Movement of Structure on Street in Home-rule Municipality

A home-rule municipality may regulate the movement of a structure over or on a street of the municipality.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: A home-rule municipality may regulate the movement of a structure over or on a street of the municipality.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
